disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
It's time for change, because I'm tired of news like this.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bf54/2f5ea88d/752b39c9/2cbc71ba/3837081380/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-30_eom-6&refcode=ema_2018-09-30_eom-6&utm_campaign=eom-6&utm_medium=ema") Dear Friend, I hope you've had a nice weekend -- and that you've had a moment for some well-deserved rest. The events of last week were hard to stomach; may we all hope that this week brings moral courage and empathy for survivors like Dr. Ford. But friend, I'm tired of hoping that one or two Republicans in the Senate will gather the courage to do the right thing and save our Supreme Court, our health care, or our planet. We are too dependent on Republicans, who time and time again fail to do the right thing. We need a blue wave to propel our values -- a progressive movement that will sweep this country and build the groundwork for victories not just now, but for years to come. Because I'm tired of news like this week's, and I hope you are too. [**I'm working to build the movement that can take on the other Washington and build a long-term plan that will help us win. But I can't do it alone. Before tonight at midnight, our biggest deadline of the year, will you chip in $5 to show you're with me?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bf54/2f5ea88d/752b39c9/2cbc71ba/3837081380/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-30_eom-6&refcode=ema_2018-09-30_eom-6&utm_campaign=eom-6&utm_medium=ema") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bf54/2f5ea88d/752b39c9/2cbc71ba/3837081380/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-30_eom-6&refcode=ema_2018-09-30_eom-6&utm_campaign=eom-6&utm_medium=ema")

body:
| |
---
#
# **_U.S. Reaches Trade Deal with Canada and Mexico_**
#
“Trade ministers from the U.S., Mexico and Canada have reached a deal to revamp the North American Free Trade Agreement, the Trump administration announced late Sunday night,” _Politico_ reports. “The new pact, which is being called the U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement, is a major step toward completing one of Trump’s signature campaign promises.” **[Click here to read more.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAxLjk1NTg2MDkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMS45NTU4NjA5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkyODk5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.politico.com/story/2018/09/30/nafta-trade-canada-819081) ** “President Trump on Monday praised Canada for joining the U.S. and Mexico in a new trilateral trade agreement that will replace NAFTA,” Pete Kasperowicz reports in the [**_Washington Examiner_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAxLjk1NTg2MDkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMS45NTU4NjA5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkyODk5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/trump-heralds-wonderful-trade-deal-with-canada-mexico). “Late last night, our deadline, we reached a wonderful new Trade Deal with Canada, to be added into the deal already reached with Mexico,” President Trump tweeted. The President also added that “the new U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement, or USMCA, is an ‘historic transaction!’” “First lady Melania Trump heads for Africa on her first big solo international trip, aiming to make child well-being the focus of a five-day, four-country tour that will take her to every corner of the vast and impoverished continent,” Darlene Superville reports for [**_The Associated Press_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAxLjk1NTg2MDkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMS45NTU4NjA5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkyODk5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://apnews.com/f54ae540100b4ae5bc6f39a8bf5c6cff). “Departing on Monday, she opens her first-ever visit to Africa on Tuesday in Ghana in the West, followed by stops in Malawi in the South, Kenya in the East and Egypt in the Northeast.” “The Trump administration’s top officials last week unleashed a full-court rhetorical press at the United Nations against Iran — and, more important, against Tehran’s enablers, who are working hard to undermine Washington’s reimposed sanctions regime,” the [**_New York Post_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAxLjk1NTg2MDkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMS45NTU4NjA5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkyODk5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://nypost.com/2018/09/29/team-trumps-timely-message-to-iran-and-its-enablers/) editorial board writes. “Team Trump has made its meaning clear: It intends to keep Iran from acquiring nukes, and — unlike his predecessor — means to curtail its rogue behavior.” “The Trump administration is putting America and Americans first by calling on China to live up to its pledge when it joined the World Trade Organization in 2001 to provide greater economic openness and to compete on a level playing field,” U.S. Ambassador to China Terry Branstad writes in the [**_Des Moines clean_body: | | U.S. Reaches Trade Deal with Canada and Mexico “Trade ministers from the U.S., Mexico and Canada have reached a deal to revamp the North American Free Trade Agreement, the Trump administration announced late Sunday night,” Politico reports. “The new pact, which is being called the U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement, is a major step toward completing one of Trump’s signature campaign promises.” “President Trump on Monday praised Canada for joining the U.S. and Mexico in a new trilateral trade agreement that will replace NAFTA,” Pete Kasperowicz reports in the . “Late last night, our deadline, we reached a wonderful new Trade Deal with Canada, to be added into the deal already reached with Mexico,” President Trump tweeted. The President also added that “the new U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement, or USMCA, is an ‘historic transaction!’” “First lady Melania Trump heads for Africa on her first big solo international trip, aiming to make child well-being the focus of a five-day, four-country tour that will take her to every corner of the vast and impoverished continent,” Darlene Superville reports for . “Departing on Monday, she opens her first-ever visit to Africa on Tuesday in Ghana in the West, followed by stops in Malawi in the South, Kenya in the East and Egypt in the Northeast.” “The Trump administration’s top officials last week unleashed a full-court rhetorical press at the United Nations against Iran — and, more important, against Tehran’s enablers, who are working hard to undermine Washington’s reimposed sanctions regime,” the editorial board writes. “Team Trump has made its meaning clear: It intends to keep Iran from acquiring nukes, and — unlike his predecessor — means to curtail its rogue behavior.” “The Trump administration is putting America and Americans first by calling on China to live up to its pledge when it joined the World Trade Organization in 2001 to provide greater economic openness and to compete on a level playing field,” U.S. Ambassador to China Terry Branstad writes in the . “Instead, China has failed to fully embrace the open, market-oriented principles that the United States champions.” | |

He will also touch upon the importance of the Christian voice in this years‘ midterm elections. _“In a world that is infatuated with power, most of us feel powerless. Powerless to control the destiny of our nation, career, financial security and even our addictions. We know we are in a battle for our lives, but we just can’t seem to find the strength we so desperately need. ‘Overcomer’ is all about the life-changing and life-saving strategies that can empower us to prevail over the emotional, physical and even spiritual chaos so many of us are confronting on a daily basis.”_
–Dr. David Jeremiah Dr. Jeremiah is among the best known Christian leaders in the world and a My Faith Votes Influencer. He serves as senior pastor of Shadow Mountain Community Church in El Cajon, California and is the founder and host of Turning Point. Turning Point‘s 30-minute radio program is heard on more than 2,200 radio stations daily. He has written more than fifty books [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzSejNbDR8c2bWf8XI-T8D5cHqTME3l0I6NB3tg152TS4g&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181001mfvl01&n=4) **My Faith Votes LIVE** shows are streamed live over the Internet at [MyFaithVotes.org](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzSejNbDR8c2bWf8XI-T8D5cHqTME3l0I6NB3tg152TS4g&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181001mfvl01&n=5) and on Facebook LIVE.

name: Steve Sisolak
subject: Look for the helpers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK |
body:
Dear Friend,

One year ago, our community was struck by an unthinkable act of violence and 58 lives were lost forever. Today, across our city, our state, and our country, we are coming together as we continue to heal and honor the memories of those taken.

For everyone who lost someone, who survived, and who were first on the scene to respond, the passage of time does not make that unthinkable tragedy any less painful. But today, while we remain shocked by the horrific events that unfolded that night, I am also reminded of the resilience, the support, and the love that came shining through in the darkest moments.

To all those who ran towards danger to help strangers, to those who tended the wounded, to those who donated food, blood, or resources, to those who, every day since that night, have been there for us, I am forever thankful.

In the early moments one year ago today, as the magnitude of the tragedy became clear, we vowed to stand Vegas Strong. Today, because of everything you have done, we are Vegas Stronger.

Today and always, we remember the 58 who are missed by their loved ones every day. I hope you join me in honoring their memories today.

Sincerely,

Steve

--------------------------------------------------------------
| PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK |

Friend,

I am honored to announce that President Barack Obama has endorsed Peggy and me in our campaign.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/3aBURwLmRzHX5f-FvIfqmecu1e-tw6gDS5OpqXfiPDc=/1IdP_HYzvDvKxoczxVC_V_YzZUDXPXuB5WsrcKFAVz4=)

I'll never forget sitting on stage in 2009 as a Member of Congress listening to President Obama's inauguration speech. He outlined a vision for an America where everyone has a chance to make their life better. It's that America that I wanted my children to grow up in.

Nine years later, despite the challenges that we face as a country, that's the kind of Minnesota that we can build together. **President Obama knows now what he knew back when he took office -- there is more that unites us than divides us.**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/3aBURwLmRzHX5f-FvIfqmecu1e-tw6gDS5OpqXfiPDc=/1IdP_HYzvDvKxoczxVC_V_YzZUDXPXuB5WsrcKFAVz4=)

**Last week,** Tim went head to head with Corey Stewart for the second debate of the campaign. The White House • October 1, 2018
## Today, we turn the page on NAFTA
##
##
**This morning from the Rose Garden,** President Donald J. Trump unveiled a modernized, rebalanced trade deal with Canada and Mexico—keeping one of the signature promises of his 2016 campaign. **In a stark contrast from the outdated NAFTA** , nearly a quarter-century old, the new United States–Mexico–Canada Agreement (USMCA) protects American workers, farmers, ranchers, and businesses. For years, politicians on both sides of the aisle have called for a renegotiation of NAFTA, but President Trump is following through where others have failed time and time again. **In negotiating terms for USMCA** , President Trump secured a number of big wins:
* American auto manufacturers and workers will benefit from new rules of origin that require _75 percent_ of auto content to be produced in North America—incentivizing billions of dollars in additional U.S. auto parts production.
* The USMCA scores a big win for American farmers by eliminating Canada’s “Class 7” program, which allowed others to undersell American dairy products. Canada will provide new access for U.S. dairy products, eggs, and poultry.
* USMCA’s labor chapter represents the strongest labor provisions of any trade agreement in our country, all of which are fully enforceable.

**USMCA brings our trade relationship** with Canada and Mexico into the 21st century. NAFTA failed repeatedly to keep up with the fast-changing American economy: The old rules helped incentivize offshoring, leading far too many manufacturing jobs to leave our country. The new agreement includes a modernized, high-standard chapter that provides strong protection and enforcement of U.S. intellectual property rights. [**President Trump's modern, rebalanced trade deal with Canada and Mexico**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAxLjk1NjIzMzExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMS45NTYyMzMxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkzMzAxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-secures-modern-rebalanced-trade-agreement-canada-mexico/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **Watch** : **[Another promise made, another promise kept](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAxLjk1NjIzMzExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMS45NTYyMzMxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkzMzAxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1046791652554264577) **
## The First Lady takes ‘Be Best’ to Africa
##
**First Lady Melania Trump** departed this afternoon for Africa, her first major solo international trip as First Lady, taking her “Be Best” message to the nations of Ghana, Malawi, Kenya, and Egypt this week. **Since the launch of Be Best** this spring, Mrs. Trump has met with children all over the world, bringing attention to the three pillars of well-being, social media use, and opioid abuse. During this week’s trip,**** the First Lady will focus on maternal and newborn care in hospitals, education for children, and the deep culture and history that is woven into each African country she’ll visit. **“Whether it is education,** drug addiction, hunger, online safety or bullying, poverty or disease, it is too often children who are hit first, and hardest, across the globe,” the First Lady said when announcing the trip. “Each of us hails from a country with its own unique challenges, but I know in my heart we are united by our commitment to raising the next generation to be happy, healthy and morally responsible adults.” **[See highlights of the First Lady’s Best Best initiative](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAxLjk1NjIzMzExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMS45NTYyMzMxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkzMzAxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://twitter.com/FLOTUS/status/1046880407235563526)** **More** : [**The First Lady’s itinerary for the week ahead**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAxLjk1NjIzMzExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMS45NTYyMzMxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkzMzAxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/first-lady-melania-trump-announces-planned-stops-visit-africa/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: We need Heidi fighting for women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
My friend Heidi Heitkamp is in the fight of her life in North Dakota. She's up against a right-wing opponent, Rep. Kevin Cramer, who callously dismissed Dr. Christine Blasey Ford's sexual assault allegation against Brett Kavanaugh as "absurd" - and even wondered whether Kavaunaugh's alleged behavior, if true, would disqualify him from serving on the Supreme Court.
I'm disgusted, Friends, but I can't say I'm surprised. Cramer has never supported women - not their right to control their own bodies, not their right to equal wages or fair access to health care - and now, this.
**Kevin Cramer does not belong in the Senate; that's why I'm fighting for Heidi. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Thanks to you, friends, my re-election campaign is entering the final stretch of this race with some incredible strength.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633ec9/1a8421e1/19a0c910d/49220b21/1571322597/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Thanks to you, friends, my re-election campaign is entering the final stretch of this race with some incredible strength. Last night, we not only met but surged past our ambitious end-of-quarter fundraising goal -- and I sincerely mean it when I say that we would not have succeeded without the support of this grassroots community. _Thank you._ But we are now 36 days out from Election Day, so my team isn't resting.**I am the most vulnerable Democrat in the House,** and it is absolutely imperative that we keep AZ-01 blue this fall, or it will be very difficult for Democrats to take back the House majority. And we are up against far-right Super PACs and mega-donors, so believe me -- the next 36 days will be a sprint to the finish line. So thank you again for staying with me, friends. And if you can spare a few dollars to support us in the final weeks of this race, [**you can donate any amount here**](http://action.tomohalleran. Yours, Tom | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.01_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. President Obama knows the stakes of this election are high, and that state leadership has never been more important. He understands that in order for one of us to succeed, we all must succeed.
That's how I'll lead our state as governor - everyone must have opportunities to thrive, not just a select few. ****[President Obama is with us. subject: Good news to share with you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | I want to take a quick moment to thank you.

Yesterday, we faced our final end-of-quarter reporting deadline before the election, and I will soon be reporting my fundraising numbers for the first time since Libertarian Gary Johnson challenged me. This was a make-or-break moment for my campaign -- _and you 're the reason we'll have good news to share._

name: Paul Chevalier
subject: Veterans Town Hall!
body:
Fellow Veterans, My name is Paul Chevalier. I am a retired Marine Corps Sergeant Major and a past State Commander of the New Hampshire Veterans of Foreign Wars. **I am writing today to tell you how important the upcoming election is and how important it is that we send a veteran to Congress.** The significance of sending veterans to Congress can not be overstated because they understand the issues faced by those who served. When they raise their hand and take an oath, whether it be to defend America with their lives or to uphold our Constitution with their vote, they mean what they say. **We have a great man and great candidate in U.S. Navy Veteran Eddie Edwards** who is running for Congress in the First Congressional District, and he has asked me to invite you to a **Town Hall on Veterans Issues.** [I hope that you will be able to join Eddie, me, and fellow veterans on October 9th at the Derry VFW Post 1617 at 6:30pm.](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyE0a8pfF-2FTvGVznY-2FCKB9JfDuSfIt-2FuBRcMj77soRNAVDgtQeiLUMWcx91Dy9YEGj7XFuzxwGA9i6tDz5YQt4IdObQzSsIwT2JDVZMiErqbJ8z2nD5qjqMtJQhqpnbkQUwQTTx-2BFOYN-2Blu2wheqh0TE-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MBur5FuYea9KUfi4Ub7OQVbsAnSh6Tu4054PajSTkI0P2IdsSajdXd4vDbg6ov-2FfJADCmG0CfHKmEMJU-2BgQoIzf-2Bhzgblz6A8HbpLb0CerD4SMzHTDDik6VYx0VAlgGp7myzkd7t-2F06sZqfPd3fPUWwT8GBoIJrhN42HW2oPjlBp3ZjvQ76QSUiiV1jaheLKdPa9qlJdYc1cvwVxlkDEXu2xOQFteHsFUwD-2F0RqI2-2F6sSLjc0hEYkcd9Y8FCHqNx3glWHvgt8Sayioy6dEteDOQ-3D-3D) **When: October 9, 2018 at 6:30pm**

| Friend,

| I know it’s hard to believe, but we’re just 36 days away from Election Day on November 6. And, as you know, voting has already begun. You can [request an absentee ballot online](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=8a33f8ce97&e=19cebfe173) or stop by your town clerk’s office before Election Day to vote. There’s a lot at stake in this election, which is why the choice is very clear. In 2016, Vermonters elected me to focus on the economy and make Vermont more affordable. And in just 20 months, we've begun to do just that! I know there’s still so much more work to do, but in my first term we’ve:
* Passed two consecutive years with level residential property tax rates;
* Achieved no new or increased taxes in the General Fund;
* Eliminated the income tax on Social Security for low-and moderate-income Vermonters, and cut state income tax rates by $30 million;
* Passed a $35 million housing bond, leveraging another $65 million in private investments, making it the single largest investment in workforce housing in Vermont history;
* Increased downtown tax credits and added 6 additional TIF districts, which will spur economic growth;
* Added 4,400 workers to our workforce after nearly a decade of decline;
* Passed tuition-free college for our National Guard Members;
* And so much more!

But our work cannot stop here. We need to keep moving forward if we want to grow the economy and make Vermont a more affordable place to live. With your help, I’m confident we’ll be successful in November, and build on the progress we’ve made. Thank you for your continued support. Sincerely,

Phil Scott

name: Ben Jealous
subject: BREAKING: President Obama's endorsement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
We just got a huge boost.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378d63/7ab0e2c4/7e0f6a5c/34983999/616022684/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-obama?refcode=OHQ10018A") Friend, I'm humbled and honored to receive my biggest endorsement yet -- from former President Barack Obama. President Obama said in his endorsement: _"Ben Jealous is an accomplished civil rights leader, businessman, and advocate for working people. His exemplary work as National President of the NAACP and as a leader in Maryland fighting for the DREAM Act, marriage equality, voting rights, and the abolition of the death penalty make him the best candidate for governor. As a social impact investor, Ben has worked closely with small businesses, creating jobs and building a more inclusive economy. He has the vision, experience, and courage to move families forward, which is why I ask all Marylanders to stand with me in supporting his election as Maryland's next governor."_ No one knows the power of this historic moment better than President Obama -- he knows what it means to be "the first." I'm proud to have his support because he knows this campaign is built on his legacy -- of believing in grassroots organizing, of bringing quality, affordable health care to everyone, and of building an equal playing field for everyone who works hard. **This is our last full month before Election Day, and this is exactly the momentum we needed to propel us to the end.** [**Join President Obama and show your support with a donation of $5 or more right now.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378d63/7ab0e2c4/7e0f6a5c/34983999/616022684/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-obama?refcode=OHQ10018A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378d63/7ab0e2c4/7e0f6a5c/34983998/616022684/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-obama?refcode=OHQ10018A&amount=5&express_lane=true")

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Vice President Biden’s gracious endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
I'm fortunate to have an incredible team of supporters behind me, powering this campaign. And today, I am excited to announce a very special addition to Team Spanberger.
| | Peter, I'm fortunate to have an incredible team of supporters behind me, powering this campaign. And today, I am excited to announce a very special addition to Team Spanberger: **_former Vice President Joe Biden,_ who has endorsed our campaign in VA-7!** I am incredibly humbled by Vice President Biden's gracious endorsement, Peter. Because of his steadfast leadership, enduring optimism, and abiding belief in the power of public service, Vice President Biden has played a transformational role in shaping the future of our country for the better. I hope you can take a minute to read Vice President Biden's kind words, from his endorsement announcement below, [**and then consider making a grassroots donation today so our campaign can continue to gain strength.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/a-yoI0_G-yqu8Fz3H7b6rl1MsPeE578tqVzRbIkQl84=/j39DqctT9dD7QPGuy47klWuTHAnrjE7u75cWlSB8A4Q=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.01_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Here is what Vice President Biden had to say about our campaign:_ "In all my years in politics, I can say that Abigail is the only former CIA Operative and Girl Scout Leader that I have had the good fortune to endorse," he said. **" And I'm proud to do so because I know Abigail has what it takes to win in November.** As a member of Congress, Abigail will work across the aisle to deliver common sense solutions and have a lasting and positive impact on the lives of the people of the 7th District." Armed with this endorsement and our growing support on the ground, we are entering the final five weeks of this race with strength, Peter. [**If you would like to help us celebrate this news and keep up our efforts, you can donate to the campaign here.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/a-yoI0_G-yqu8Fz3H7b6rl1MsPeE578tqVzRbIkQl84=/j39DqctT9dD7QPGuy47klWuTHAnrjE7u75cWlSB8A4Q=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.01_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thank you, \- Abigail P.S. Thanks to this grassroots team, we had a tremendous end of the third fundraising quarter last night, meeting a _very_ ambitious goal. Thank you for [**your continued support**](https://act.myngp.com/el/a-yoI0_G-yqu8Fz3H7b6rl1MsPeE578tqVzRbIkQl84=/j39DqctT9dD7QPGuy47klWuTHAnrjE7u75cWlSB8A4Q=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.01_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) of this campaign; we will win this race together. body:

Friends--

When Virginians elect Democrats, good things happen in the Commonwealth of Virginia. Medicaid expansion. Teacher Raises. Investing in our green energy future. **Imagine what could happen if Virginians elected Leslie Cockburn in Virginia 's 5th Congressional District.**
I know Leslie has a real chance to win this open seat. And I'm not the only one: RealClearPolitics rates this race as a "toss-up," and Democrats across the country are fired up to elect Leslie.

subject: Derek, the Senate Judiciary Committee voted Friday to approve Judge Kavanaugh, moving him one step closer to a lifetime appointment to the highest court in the country.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
So here's what's next: We must continue to push for this FBI investigation to be comprehensive and fair. We must continue to fight back against a rushed process. --------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, the Senate Judiciary Committee voted Friday to approve Judge Kavanaugh, moving him one step closer to a lifetime appointment to the highest court in the country.

Many senators pushed for a thorough FBI investigation regarding the serious allegations of sexual assault. As of today, an investigation is underway. But we _don't_ know the exact scope of that investigation, or what will happen afterwards.

**So here's what's next: We must continue to push for this FBI investigation to be comprehensive and fair. We must continue to fight back against a rushed process. And no matter what happens with Judge Kavanaugh's nomination, in 36 days, we must VOTE.**

[Now more than ever before, it's clear we need a Democratic majority in Congress to fight for what we all believe in. Sign your name with us against this rushed vote. Donate to candidates who mean something to you. And Derek, VOTE.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f104b/3e0906/717b8b0c/3e365a1f/2298999986/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/kavanaugh-hearing?source=20181001_2_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-hearing-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Now+more+than+ever+before+its+clear+we+n&utm_campaign=20181001_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-hearing-RS")

\-----------------
_We're forwarding this note from the team last week. Give it a read if you haven't already or forward it to someone who may want to see it._ Derek, our children are watching.

Dr. Blasey Ford presented herself as extremely credible and her testimony was courageous.

If we're going to be respectful of the seriousness of the allegation, Tim believes we have to hear from Ms. Ramirez and Ms. Swetnick. We need to subpoena Mark Judge to come testify. And there may be other witnesses we should hear from.

Remember, our children are watching. If an allegation of serious sexual assault gets swept under the rug, it will make it harder for survivors across the country to come out and seek help. Let's hear from everybody, do the FBI investigation that should be done, and do it in a respectful manner.

That's what a deliberative body like the Senate should do. This nomination cannot be rushed through without the investigation that is deserved, the FBI investigation that Dr. Blasey Ford has always requested.
